name: Nemotron Speech (Riva NIM)
description: Route a Nemotron Speech (Riva) NIM prompt to the right bundled reference (ASR/TTS/NMT) — read-only classifier.

prepared.description: inputs validated — required vars present, runtime + store reachable

verified.description: the plan is contract-bound — the perk's tool sequence resolves and its contract (I/O + checks) is in place

executed.description: the perk's tool sequence ran ONLY via executor.py — each step is recorded to the run-ledger AS it runs (recording is part of execution, not a step after)

g_governed.description: ran ONLY through executor.py; contract enforced

a_prepare.description: validator confirms required vars + writable record_store + reachable runtime

a_verify.description: confirm the perk's sequence + contracts are bound

a_execute.description: run the perk's tool sequence via executor.py — recording each step to the run-ledger as it runs

safety_invariants.name: governed_execution_only
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: a task reaches 'executed' ONLY through executor.py — the single governed channel; the runtime is the enforcement.

safety_invariants.name: record_during_execution
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: recording is PART of executing — each step is written to the run-ledger as it runs, not in a separate phase after.

safety_invariants.name: verify_before_execute
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: nothing executes until its tool sequence + contract are bound.

safety_invariants.name: oversight_clears_script
safety_invariants.description: GUARDRAIL: the compiled script must clear OVERSIGHT_RULE — enforced INSIDE the executor (scanned before any step runs; approvable rules waived only by an explicit --approve, recorded in the run-ledger).
